Google analytics alternative for Web3

Cookie3 Analytics is a suite of analytics tools for Web3 applications. It provides insights into user behavior and application performance.

On-chain affiliate campaigns

Cookie3 Affiliate is the first premissionless, open affiliate marketplace for KOLs and Web3 projects.

Web3 on-off-chain reputation system

Cookie3 Score is a decentralized identity and reputation system for Web3. It allows users to build trust and reputation across applications.

Strategic Partnership

Cookie3 x Cookie DAO

$COOKIE gives a stake in AI Revolution & exposure for Multi-chain Airdrops.

The Cookie Ecosystem was created through a partnership between Cookie3 and the Cookie DAO. Cookie DAO was created by the early members of the community who belived in MarketingFi and wanted to drive it further. To achieve this, Cookie3 partnerred with Cookie DAO to give $COOKIE utility across the Cookie3 platforms and create a joint Cookie Ecosystem.

Data Credits for AI Models

The more demand on data to train LLMs, ML and AI, the more demand on $COOKIE.

Multi-chain Airdops for Stakers

Staking $COOKIE gives exposure to multi-chain airdrops

Governance & DAO

$COOKIE gives governance rights and co-ownership in DAO.

“

“With Cookie3, marketers can finally evaluate off-chain metrics such as engagement on social media and wallet connections alongside subsequent on-chain interactions. Cookie3 uses the same data that can be found on Ethercan or Dune, combines it with off-chain data, and presents it in an easy-to-use, automated, no-code analytical tool” )

Read

“

“90% or more of the whole market for advertising is being monopolized by Google, Facebook, and a few other companies.We believe that we should decentralize this kind of distribution.” says Filip Wielanier, co-founder and CEO of Cookie3.“
